auditor: independent read-only subagent with repo-safe sanitization

checks.name: stop_gate_no_production_code_changes
evidence: Owner stop artifacts state implementation_changes=false and desktop_started=false.
Packet and closeout identify this contour as a stop gate.
No backend, live server, command adapter, runtime, or desktop files are touched by this contour.

checks.name: owner_artifacts_exist_and_are_valid
evidence: Owner review packet exists.
Owner review matrix exists and parses as JSON.
Owner review closeout exists and includes Resume From Here.

checks.name: all_screenshot_paths_exist
evidence: All ten screenshot paths listed in the packet and matrix exist on disk.
Checked surfaces include overview, accounts, API connections, diagnostics, settings, setup, select client, import existing, confirmation modal, and onboard modal.

checks.name: freeze_precheck_source_artifacts_exist_and_have_correct_states
evidence: Freeze precheck closeout, matrix, browser smoke, and independent audit exist.
Freeze precheck final state is PASS_WITH_OWNER_REVIEW_NOTES.
Freeze browser smoke result is PASS.
Freeze independent audit verdict is PASS.

checks.name: desktop_blocked_until_explicit_owner_approval
evidence: Packet says desktop phase remains blocked until explicit owner approval.
Matrix sets desktop_blocked_until_owner_approval=true.
Closeout repeats that desktop remains blocked.

checks.name: no_runtime_pilot_or_production_readiness_claim
evidence: Packet explicitly negates desktop admission, pilot readiness, runtime scale proof, production readiness, and live-runtime proof.
Closeout says there is no runtime, pilot, or production readiness claim.
Matrix keeps runtime_readiness_claim, pilot_readiness_claim, and production_readiness_claim false.

checks.name: external_reference_service_traces_absent
evidence: Scoped scan over owner stop artifacts found no external reference service traces.
Owner stop artifacts contain only repo-local evidence paths.

checks.name: closeout_has_resume_from_here
evidence: Closeout contains Resume From Here with wait-for-owner instruction.
Packet also contains Resume From Here.

checks.name: git_diff_does_not_touch_forbidden_layers
evidence: No backend, live server, command adapter, runtime, or desktop source-tree paths are modified.
Only owner stop audit artifacts are expected for this contour.

residual_risks: Owner has not yet given design approval.
If owner requests changes, the next step must be a targeted UI repair contour.
